parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in a natural setting with realistic lighting, natural micro-expressions, and fluid hand gestures. The app interfaces and text overlays are added in post-production.

characters.appearance: Young woman in her 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, dark, slightly wavy hair with bangs. Her facial features are soft and natural.
characters.wardrobe: A sheer, long-sleeved white button-up blouse worn over a plain white top.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, expressive, and friendly, using natural hand gestures to emphasize her story.

scenes.setting: Indoors, plain white wall background, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman is sitting indoors against a plain white wall. She is holding a smartphone in her hands, looking down at the screen, and speaking into it. She is wearing a sheer white button-up blouse. The lighting is soft and natural.
A blurred, indistinct background, likely a continuation of a neutral indoor setting. No characters or distinct objects are visible.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen shows a woman on the left using a smartphone, while the right side displays a screencast of a language learning app. Text overlays appear at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Can I have two lattes?
Character A says: Can I have a coffee?
scenes.on_screen_text:
오늘부터 시작하면 7일 후엔 1,000문장을 말할 수 있어요 (If you start today, you can speak 1,000 sentences in 7 days)
이제 스피킹 하세요... (Now speak...)
Can I have two lattes?
Can I have a coffee?

scenes.setting: Indoors, light grey wall, a potted green plant in the background, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits facing the camera in a medium close-up shot. She is in a brightly lit room with a light grey wall behind her. To her right, a potted green plant with thin leaves is visible. She is wearing a sheer white button-up blouse over a white top. She gestures with her hands as she speaks, looking slightly off-camera as if addressing an interviewer.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is giving an interview, explaining a past experience. Large text overlays highlight key phrases from her speech. A brand logo and her name are in the top corners.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 해외에서 한국식으로 아이스 아메리카노를 달라고 하니까 [When I asked for an iced Americano in a Korean way abroad,]
Character A says: 직원분이 못 알아 들으시더라고요. [the staff couldn't understand me.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
스픽 유저 오송현님 (Speak user Oh Song-hyun)
Speak
해외에서 한국식으로 아이스 아메리카노를 달라고 하니까 (When I asked for an iced Americano in a Korean way abroad,)
직원분이 못 알아 들으시더라고요 (the staff couldn't understand me)
Q. 스픽이 필요하게 된 계기가 무엇인가요? (Q. What made you need Speak?)

scenes.setting: Indoors, light grey wall, a potted green plant in the background, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits facing the camera in a medium close-up shot. The setting is identical to the previous scene: a light grey wall and a potted green plant to her right. She continues to speak, using hand gestures to emphasize her points. Her expression is earnest.

scenes.visual_description: The interview continues with the woman explaining her realization of needing to learn English. Dynamic text overlays emphasize her spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 영어가 필요하다고 절실하게 느꼈어요. [I desperately felt the need for English.]
Character A says: 10년이 넘게 배운 영어도 안 쓰다 보니까 입이 굳어 버리고 [Even the English I learned for over 10 years, because I didn't use it, my mouth froze]
Character A says: 조금 알던 영어도 점점 퇴화하고 못 하게 되더라고요. [and the little English I knew gradually deteriorated and I couldn't speak it.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
스픽 유저 오송현님 (Speak user Oh Song-hyun)
Speak
영어가 필요하다고 절실하게 느꼈어요 (I desperately felt the need for English)
10년이 넘게 배운 영어도 안 쓰다 보니까 입이 굳어 버리고 (Even the English I learned for over 10 years, because I didn't use it, my mouth froze)
조금 알던 영어도 점점 퇴화하고 못 하게 되더라고요 (and the little English I knew gradually deteriorated and I couldn't speak it)
Q. 스픽이 도움이 되는 점은 무엇인가요? (Q. What is helpful about Speak?)

scenes.setting: Indoors, light grey wall, a potted green plant in the background, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman remains in the same medium close-up framing against the light grey wall with the potted plant. She is speaking enthusiastically, smiling more, and using her hands to illustrate her story. Her demeanor is positive and relieved.

scenes.visual_description: The woman shares a positive experience using the app. Text overlays continue to highlight her speech, changing color for emphasis.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 해외여행에서 사진 찍어달라고 부탁할 때 [When asking someone to take a picture while traveling abroad]
Character A says: "키 커 보이게 찍어주세요" 이런 말을 항상 하고 싶었는데 ["Please take it so I look tall" I always wanted to say things like this]
Character A says: 스픽에 그 문장이 진짜로 있더라고요. [That sentence was actually in Speak.]
Character A says: 그래서 저도 다음에 해외여행 갈 때 꼭 그 표현을 써보고 싶어요. [So I really want to try using that expression next time I go on an overseas trip.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
스픽 유저 오송현님 (Speak user Oh Song-hyun)
Speak
해외여행에서 사진 찍어달라고 부탁할 때 (When asking someone to take a picture while traveling abroad)
"키 커 보이게 찍어주세요" 이런 말을 항상 하고 싶었는데 ("Please take it so I look tall" I always wanted to say things like this)
스픽에 그 문장이 진짜로 있더라고요 (That sentence was actually in Speak)
그래서 저도 다음에 해외여행 갈 때 꼭 그 표현을 써보고 싶어요 (So I really want to try using that expression next time I go on an overseas trip)

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, vibrant blue background. A 3D render of a modern smartphone is positioned in the center, displaying a blank screen. The lighting on the phone suggests a studio setup.

scenes.visual_description: An end card featuring a smartphone displaying the app's interface against a blue background. Text prompts the viewer to start using the app, and a voiceover delivers the brand slogan.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: 영어 스피킹은 스픽. [English speaking is Speak.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
더 많은 영어 표현을 알고 싶다면 (If you want to know more English expressions)
지금 스픽에서 시작하세요! (Start on Speak now!)
Speak
TV 보다 놀이더 (입이 혼자 연습하기, 쉽지) (Playing more than TV (Practicing alone with your mouth, easy))
The weather is nice today. (오늘 날씨가 좋네.)
나만의 레슨 만들기 (Create my own lesson)
Hello! I see you're wearing a classic
